note: NYCHA scores are PHA-level composites from HUD PHAS/NSPIRE. PACT scores are per-property REAC multifamily inspection scores, matched to PACT development names by property name in the HUD multifamily inspection file — address confirmation not available. PHAS and NSPIRE use different scoring methodologies; scores are not directly comparable across the 2024 system change.

systems.PHAS: Public Housing Assessment System, 0–100, retired 2023. Composite of physical (30pts), financial (25pts), management (25pts), capital fund (10pts).
systems.NSPIRE: National Standards for Physical Inspection of Real Estate, 0–100, introduced 2024. More stringent than PHAS; scores are not directly comparable.
systems.REAC_MF: REAC Multifamily physical inspection score, 0–100. Used for HUD-assisted multifamily housing including RAD/PACT-converted properties.

nycha.source: City Limits / NYCHA Now reporting (2022–23 average)
